text: API Gateway - ERRORS @ wtentin @ st ® 4XX - Client Error - Invalid request on client side R—— ® 5XX - Server Error - Valid request, backend issue ::frsyem!! * 400 - Bad Request - Generic * 403 - Access Denied - Authorizer denies.. WAF Filtered * 429 - AP| Gateway can throttle - this means you've exceeded that amount ¢ 502 - Bad Gateway Exception - bad output returned by lambda ¢ 503 - Service Unavailable - backing endpoint offline? Major service issues * 504 - Integration Failure/Timeout - 29s limit
